name: Figma Design
description: Files, frames, components, comments, variables via Figma's official MCP

env_vars.how_to_set: figma.com → Settings → Account → Personal access tokens → Generate new token

tools.name: get_file
tools.description: Retrieve a Figma file's full document tree including all pages, frames, and layers

file_key.description: The Figma file key extracted from the file URL

depth.description: Depth of the node tree to return (default returns full tree)

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List all projects in a Figma team, including project IDs and names

team_id.description: The Figma team ID to list projects for

tools.name: get_components
tools.description: Retrieve all published components from a Figma file including their descriptions and thumbnails

file_key.description: The Figma file key to retrieve components from

tools.name: export_node
tools.description: Export one or more Figma nodes as PNG, JPG, SVG, or PDF at a specified scale

file_key.description: The Figma file key containing the node to export

node_ids.description: List of node IDs to export

format.description: Export format: png, jpg, svg, or pdf

tools.name: get_comments
tools.description: Retrieve all comments on a Figma file, including resolved comments and replies

file_key.description: The Figma file key to fetch comments for
